vulnerability.reference: Human operators become complacent when agreement-on-the-line metrics show high confidence, reducing independent safety checks.
vulnerability.generated: Low ensemble diversity in OOD monitoring yields over-optimistic agreement lines, masking safety degradation from engineers.

impact.reference: Undetected model safety degradation leads to harmful outputs in clinical diagnosis, causing patient harm and regulatory penalties.
impact.generated: Undetected reward hacking degrades model safety, leading to harmful and unreliable AI behavior in production.

dose_response.reference: Metric over-optimization from fragile safety measurement yields over-optimistic agreement-on-the-line, inducing human complacency that delays detection of model safety degradation, leading to patient harm and regulatory penalties.
dose_response.generated: Antifragile self-improvement's reliance on fragile safety measurement enables reward hacking, which through ML engineers' production monitoring with low ensemble diversity yields over-optimistic OOD agreement lines masking degradation, causing undetected reward hacking and harmful AI behavior.
